extensionDescription.message: Generate Chrome extensions using AI with text and image prompts.

apiKeyMissing.message: API Key is not set. Please configure it in settings.

chatInputPlaceholder.message: Describe your extension, ask a question, or type a message...

codeViewerPlaceholder.message: Select a file to view its content.

outputPanePlaceholder.message: Start a conversation on the left to describe the extension you want to build. Generated files will appear here.

startOverConfirmation.message: Interface cleared. Ready for a new extension.

errorApiKeyMissing.message: Error: API Key is missing. Please set it in the settings.

errorInvalidJsonStructure.message: Error: Received invalid JSON structure from API for file generation.

errorParsingJson.message: Error: Could not parse JSON response from API.

errorNoCandidate.message: API returned no valid response candidate.

errorEmptyPromptGeneric.message: Please describe the extension you want to build in the chat.

errorInvalidFileType.message: Invalid file type. Please select an image.

statusGeneratedMessageContent.message: Extension files generated successfully! You can browse them in the file tree on the right.

copyrightNotice.message: Copyright © 2026 SoraVantia GK. All rights reserved.

helpModalTitle.message: 🚀 How to Use NuModeX Ext Maker

helpStep1Text.message: Click Settings (⚙️) → Get API key from the cloud provider → Paste and "Save Key"

helpStep2Text.message: Choose a model from the dropdown menu

helpStep3Text.message: Read and accept the Terms of Service

helpStep4Text.message: Type what you want to build in the chat

helpStep7Text.message: Extract ZIP → Chrome Extensions → Developer mode ON → "Load unpacked"

helpDone.message: Done! Your extension is now installed.

improvePromptLabel.message: Describe what you want to improve, add, or change across the entire extension:

improvePromptPlaceholder.message: e.g., Add dark mode support, improve the popup UI, add a settings page, fix the content script to work on all sites...

editPromptPlaceholder.message: Describe the changes you want to make to this file...

addFilePromptPlaceholder.message: Describe what this file should contain...

undoSuccess.message: Undo successful — reverted to previous state.

onDeviceNotAvailable.message: On-device AI is not available in this browser.

onDeviceDownloading.message: Downloading on-device AI model. This may take a few minutes...

onDeviceBuildDisabled.message: On-device models can only be used for chat and editing. Select a cloud model to build extensions.

eulaTitle.message: Terms of Service & End User License Agreement

eulaAgreeCheckbox.message: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service
